name: AirMech
short_description: AirMech® Strike is a fast paced Action-RTS game that can be played solo, coop, or competitively online. Earn Kudos and Experience in battle and unlock a wide collection of AirMechs and Units while you practice the perfect strategy to emerge victorious!
detailed_description:
AirMech® is an Action-RTS game that can be played solo, coop, or against other players or teams online. A unique blend of Tower Defense with light RTS gameplay has something for everyone. Explore at your own pace, recovering Parts from defeated enemies, making your AirMechs more powerful as you advance. Gameplay related items are unlocked through play, with tons of content to explore

Key Features:

  • Action-RTS Transformed: Your AirMech is your cursor for a twist on typical RTS games! From the skies pickup and drop your units to help them, or transform into mech mode and fight along side them. Currently there are 9 unique AirMech frames to choose from, and many skins for each. Every AirMech suits a particular playstyle, so you can pick one and make it perfect or collect a full stable for maximum flexibility.
  • Build Your Army: Dozens of Units are available as you progress through the game. Play the way you want to, between your AirMech and the Units you choose to build.
  • Control Options: Supports both mouse/keyboard and gamepad. (gamepad support WIP, plays well ingame)

supported_languages:
English*, German, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Polish, Dutch, Finnish, Swedish, Czech, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
